prompt: Fill in some more realistic data in the "MONTHLY FEE" row with $15, $20, $25, and $30 for Plans A, B, C, and D respectively.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. In the 'MONTHLY FEE' row of the comparison chart, update the current values. Change the monthly fee to $15 for Plan A, $20 for Plan B, $25 for Plan C, and $30 for Plan D.

Orange header bar with "Features" and "Plan A, Plan B, Plan C, Plan D" column headers
"CUSTOMER SERVICE" row with "24/7" values for all plans
"MONTHLY FEE" row with updated values: $15 (Plan A), $20 (Plan B), $25 (Plan C), $30 (Plan D)
"FREE TEXT" row with "1000" values for all plans
"FREE CALLS" row with "5 hours" values for all plans
